category_sources: source_facts.description says programming language for Java and Scheme implementation; official GNU Kawa page describes Kawa as a programming language on the Java platform and an extension of Scheme.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kawa; official GNU page title is The Kawa Scheme language.
docs_sources: Official GNU Kawa site links to Reference Documentation and Kawa Scheme Tutorial from the project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU Getting Kawa page says sources are managed in Git and gives git clone https://gitlab.com/kashell/Kawa.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Scheme on Java; official GNU Kawa page describes a Java-platform programming language, Scheme extension, REPL, and compiler benefits.
